vertexInput.note: Unit quad produced from @builtin(vertex_index); no vertex buffer, draw 6 vertices as a triangle list.

blendModes.name: normal
blendModes.blend: src * ONE + dst * ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA (premultiplied source-over), same equation for color and alpha

blendModes.name: add
blendModes.blend: src * ONE + dst * ONE for color and alpha; source is premultiplied before blending

colorPipeline.note: Scene colors are CSS sRGB hex strings. CPU side converts sRGB -> linear and premultiplies by alpha before writing uniforms. The *-srgb render target re-encodes on store, so readback bytes are sRGB-encoded.
